login.terms: By signing in you accept the tournament rules

grupos.title: My groups

match.loginToPredict: Sign in to make your prediction →

perfil.title: Profile
perfil.notificationsDescription: We notify you 2 hours before each match if you haven't submitted a prediction yet, and send a daily points summary.

invite.invalidDescription: This invite link is not valid or is no longer available.
invite.loggedInDescription: Joining this group lets you compete with its members.
invite.guestDescription: Sign in to join this group and compete.

reglas.title: Scoring rules
reglas.subtitle: How points are calculated for each match.
reglas.sectionKnockoutSubtitle: Same score as group stage for the result, plus a bonus for the qualifier.
reglas.exactResultDesc: You get both scores right. E.g.: you predict 2-1 and it ends 2-1.
reglas.correctPlusOneDesc: You get the winner (or draw) and one of the two goals. E.g.: predict 2-1, ends 2-0.
reglas.correctResultDesc: You get the winner or draw, but neither score. E.g.: predict 2-1, ends 3-0.
reglas.wrongResultDesc: The team you picked to win lost, or you predicted a draw and there was a winner.
reglas.exactPlusWinnerDesc: Both scores exact and you get the qualifier right. Maximum possible.
reglas.exactNoWinnerDesc: You predict a draw with exact score (e.g. 1-1) but get the qualifier wrong.
reglas.correctPlusWinnerDesc: You get the result (without exact scores) and the qualifier right.
reglas.onlyCorrectDesc: You get the result right but got the qualifier wrong.
reglas.bonusNote: The score is evaluated at the end of regular time (90 min). The qualifier may differ if the match is decided in extra time or penalties.
reglas.bonusesNote: The following bonuses only apply if you first get the result right
